conditions.method: QHGK, DFT force constants, hydrodynamic extrapolation

source.detail: "reduces the thermal conductivity to approximately 2.4 Wm-1K-1 at room temperature" (p. 8). MAP had guessed bte_solver=direct_inverse; the methods say QHGK, so the value lands on the qhgk transport-model node. Effects of colored disorder on the heat conductivity of SiGe alloys from first principles (D. Donadio group), 2024
